title: Turn a Google Slides deck into a shareable video
description: Already made the deck? Vids imports it, layers in narration, and exports a video — no starting from scratch. Great for turning PD decks into on-demand videos, parent-night presentations into follow-up content families can rewatch, or lesson slides into flipped-classroom videos.
steps: Open vids.google.com.
Create a new video → choose Import from Google Slides.
Pick your deck. Each slide becomes a scene.
Add narration — record your own voice, or use AI voice (Voiceover → Generate with AI).
Adjust scene timing, add transitions, drop in stock media if needed.
Click Share → get a link, or Download as MP4.
note: Contributor: Scott Shirey · Repurpose anything you've already made. Combined with Tip #007 (Meet Live Translate), your videos reach families in any language. Do not include student-identifying information in scripts.
